title: Mailchimp vs Brevo (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Mailchimp vs Brevo: pricing, features, ease of use, and which email marketing platform suits your needs.
h1: Mailchimp vs Brevo: A Detailed Comparison
intro: Mailchimp and Brevo are two of the most popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different needs and audiences. Mailchimp excels at simplicity for beginners and small businesses, while Brevo offers more advanced features like SMS, WhatsApp, and CRM capabilities. This comparison will help you determine which platform aligns best with your marketing goals.
choose_a_if: You're a complete beginner and want the simplest email marketing tool to start with
You have a small contact list under 500 subscribers and want to keep costs minimal
You only need email marketing and don't require multi-channel capabilities
choose_b_if: You need an all-in-one platform with email, SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat capabilities
You want to leverage a built-in CRM for customer relationship management
You require transactional email API for automated, non-marketing emails
You want significantly more contacts on the free plan (100,000 vs 500)
You value customer satisfaction, as reflected in Brevo's superior ratings

faq.a: Neither is objectively "better"—it depends on your needs. Mailchimp is better for beginners seeking simplicity, while Brevo is better for businesses needing multi-channel marketing, CRM, and transactional email capabilities. Brevo offers more advanced features and significantly higher customer satisfaction ratings.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or Brevo?
faq.a: Mailchimp starts at $13/month compared to Brevo's $25/month, making Mailchimp cheaper for paid plans. However, Brevo's free tier accommodates 100,000 contacts versus Mailchimp's 500, making Brevo substantially more cost-effective for growing businesses staying on the free plan.

faq.q: Can I switch from Brevo to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your contact lists and email campaigns. Most email marketing tools support CSV exports, making migration relatively straightforward. However, custom automations and advanced configurations may require manual rebuilding in your new platform.
